zh.Castellero, Asti, Piemonte, Itália: 義大利皮蒙特阿斯蒂卡斯特勒洛
zh.Castellero, Asti, Piedmont, Italy: 義大利皮蒙特阿斯蒂卡斯特勒洛
zh.Parma, Italy: 義大利艾米利亞-洛馬尼亞帕爾馬
zh.lifeSummary: 當Giberto di Corregio於大約1270年出生在義大利皮蒙特阿斯蒂卡斯特勒洛時，他的父親Guido da Correggio47歲，母親Mabila della Gente11268歲。他於大約1303年與Caterina da Camino結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1326年7月26日在他的家鄉享年57歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Giberto di Corregio于大约1270年出生在意大利皮蒙特阿斯蒂卡斯特勒洛时，他的父亲Guido da Correggio47岁，母亲Mabila della Gente11268岁。他于大约1303年与Caterina da Camino结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1326年7月26日在他的家乡享年57岁。

nameMeanings.name: di
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Mandarin form of the surname 狄, a term referring to the tribes in ancient northern China: (i) from Di (狄), the name of an ancient state (thought to have been located in Hebei or Shandong province), which was granted to Xiao Bo or Kao Bo by King Cheng of Zhou (reigned 1042–1021  BC ). (ii) adopted as a surname by the Ku Di (庫狄) family during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) traced back to other minority ethnic groups in ancient northwestern China.

Mandarin form of the Chinese surname 邸, meaning ‘official residence’ in Chinese: (i) from placename Di (邸), the name of a county (unidentified location). (ii) said to be borne by some descendants of Kujula Kadphises (called 丘就郤 or 邸就郤 in Chinese, 30–c. 80 AD ), founder of the Kushan Empire (one branch of the Yuezhi people originating from western China) located in Central Asia during the Eastern Han dynasty (25–220 AD ).

variants.name: Chi
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Dong, Yun, Cheng, Jae, Yong, Cheng Chung, Chi, Chun, Duk, Fang, Feng.  Korean Chung, Chong, Jae Hong, Moon, Myong, Pong, Shen, Yoo, Byung, Chang, Chol, Chong Hun.  Southeast Asian Phi, Hung, Ly, Tu, Denh, Do Van, Duong, Hao, Kieu, Mui, Nga, Phat.

Chinese: Mandarin and Cantonese form of the surname 池, meaning ‘moat’ in ancient Chinese: (i) acquired as a surname by people who lived beside a moat. (ii) from Chi (池), said to be the name of an ancient state (of unknown location and period). (iii) from the personal name Chi (池), personal name of a son of an official in the state of Qin during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ).

Chinese: Mandarin and Cantonese form of the surname 遲, meaning ‘late’ in Chinese: (i) borne by descendants of Chi Ren (遲任), a person who lived during the Shang dynasty (1600–1046  BC ). (ii) shortened form of the Chinese compound surname Yu-Chi (尉遲), originally the name of a tribe from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China. (iii) from the second element of the personal name Zi Chi (子遲), style name of Fan Xu, a student of Confucius (551–479  BC ).

nameMeanings.name: Giberto
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Giberto di Corregio was born about 1270, in Castellero, Asti, Piedmont, Italy, his father, Guido da Correggio, was 47 and his mother, Mabila della Gente, was 11268. He married Caterina da Camino about 1303. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 26 July 1326, in his hometown, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Giberto di Corregio est né environ 1270, à Castellero, Asti, Piemonte, Italie, son père, Guido da Correggio, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Mabila della Gente, avait 11268 ans. Il a épousé Caterina da Camino environ 1303. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 26 juillet 1326, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 57 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Giberto di Corregio um 1270 in Castellero, Asti, Piemonte, Italien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Guido da Correggio 47 und seine Mutter Mabila della Gente 11268. Er hat um 1303 Caterina da Camino geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 26. Juli 1326 im Alter von 57 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Giberto di Corregio è nato il circa 1270 nel Castellero, Asti, Piemonte, Italia, il suo padre, Guido da Correggio, aveva 47 anni e il suo madre, Mabila della Gente, aveva 11268 anni. Lui sposato Caterina da Camino circa 1303. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 26 luglio 1326, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 57 anni.

ja.Castellero, Asti, Piedmont, Italy: イタリアピエモントアスティカステラーオ

ja.Verona, Italy: イタリアベンエトーバーオナ
ja.lifeSummary: Giberto di Corregioが約1270年にイタリアピエモントアスティカステラーオで生まれた時，父Guido da Correggioは47歳，母Mabila della Genteは11268歳であった。約1303年にCaterina da Caminoと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1326年7月26日に故郷で57歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Giberto di Corregio(이)가 대략 1270년 이탈리아 피몽 애스티 카스텔레로에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Guido da Correggio(은)는 47세였고, 그의 어머니 Mabila della Gente(은)는 11268세였다. 그는 대략 1303년 Caterina da Camino(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1326년 7월 26일 그의 고향에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Giberto di Corregio nasceu aproximadamente 1270, em Castellero, Asti, Piemonte, Itália, seu pai, Guido da Correggio, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Mabila della Gente, tinha 11268 anos. Ele casou-se com Caterina da Camino aproximadamente 1303. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 26 de julho de 1326, em sua cidade natal, com 57 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Giberto di Corregio родился около 1270 г. в местности кастеллиро, асти, пиемонт, Италия, его отцу по имени Guido da Correggio было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Mabila della Gente, 11268. Он женился на женщине по имени Caterina da Camino около 1303 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 26 июля 1326 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 57 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Giberto di Corregio nació aproximadamente 1270, en Castellero, Asti, Piemonte, Italia, su papá, Guido da Correggio, tenía 47 años y su mamá, Mabila della Gente, tenía 11268 años. Se casó con Caterina da Camino aproximadamente 1303. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 26 de julio de 1326, en su pueblo, a la edad de 57 años.
